title: Nested `generate for` inside `generate if` not executed
body:
Using latest Git main.

I tried to create a small unit test, but I was not able to repeat the issue with simple code.
https://github.com/jeras/verilator/commit/abba4830bc616cf71dde0ab2b82235cd6d0d09ec
I probably have to learn some more advanced debugging techniques for Verilator.

I also think I encountered many issues related to the use of `@(posedge clk)` inside `task`s inside `initial` statements that look like race conditions, so I had to add unit delays which I usually avoid as the plague. I will try to write some regression tests for those, but I do not understand that part of the SystemVerilog spec well enough to be sure what is the correct behavior.

So to reproduce the issue:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/jeras/TCB.git
cd TCB
cd sim/verilator
make TOP=tcb_vip_tb
```
The code not getting executed is here:
https://github.com/jeras/TCB/blob/main/hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_sub.sv#L129-L141
The `tcb.DLY` parameter is set to 2.

The Verilator output is:
```
$ make TOP=tcb_vip_tb
verilator --binary -O3 -j 0 --timescale 1ps/1ps --x-assign fast -Wno-INITIALDLY --assert --trace-fst --trace-structs   --top tcb_vip_tb ../../hdl/rtl/tcb_if.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_pas.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_reg.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_arb.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_mux.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_dec.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_dmx.sv ../../hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_err.sv ../../hdl/rtl/gpio/tcb_gpio.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_ser.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_des.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart_fifo.sv ../../hdl/rtl/uart/tcb_uart.sv ../../hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_pkg.sv ../../hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_mon.sv ../../hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_sub.sv ../../hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_man.sv ../../hdl/tbn/vip/tcb_vip_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/lib/tcb_lib_pas_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/lib/tcb_lib_reg_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/lib/tcb_lib_mux_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/lib/tcb_lib_dmx_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/gpio/tcb_gpio_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model_tb.sv ../../hdl/tbn/uart/tcb_uart_tb.sv

make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/izi/VLSI/rp32/submodules/tcb/sim/verilator/obj_dir'
obj_dir/Vtcb_vip_tb

@TOP.tcb_vip_tb.mon: TCB log: W: adr=0x00000000 ben=0b1111 dat=0x01234567 txt="#Eg" err=0
```

```
Time resolution is 1 ps
```
